_source: Extracted from gate_tool/js/ultra_dsg_min.js — DO NOT EDIT without re-verifying against Ultra live tool at https://www.ultrafence.com/design-studio/gates/index.html

height_y_offsets._note: tY = scene Y offset applied to picket groups via mY(grpte, tY+_12+fsv)

style_fsv_offsets._note: fsv = vertical offset applied to rails and pickets based on style family

pro_spacing._note: grptx and grpbx are ALWAYS loaded but visibility toggled in viz(). xtr=true only for pi==201 or pi==101.

picket_y_positions._note: mY(grpte, tY+_12+fsv) — same for grpto. grptx uses style-specific offset.

clipping_planes._note: Three.js does NOT auto-normalize plane normals. Non-normalized (0,±0.735,0) used for pickets — this is intentional and matches Ultra exactly.

picket_top_pteCp_ptoCp_ptxCp.warning: DO NOT normalize this normal — effective clip = constant/|normal| = -0.735/0.735 = -1.0 in normalized space, BUT Three.js clips where dot(normal,point)+constant=0, so with non-normalized normal the clip is at y=1.0

rails._note: r0=top rail, r1=second top rail, r2=mid rail (optional), r3=extra lower rail (optional), r4=bottom rail

post_cap_positions._note: pc0-pc3 = outer/inner gate posts. pc4-pc5 = center seam caps (double leaf only, at +/-0.044)

single_leaf_xS._note_pc0_single: Ultra adds +0.07 to pc0 in single leaf: pcPo[0].xS + 0.07

post_cap_positions.outer_post_scale: pc0 and pc1 scaled 1.545x in all axes

center_seam_caps_pc4_pc5.y_formula: htY + midY + pcY + _2_5  where midY=_12=0.3048 by default
center_seam_caps_pc4_pc5.arch_y_note: midY comes from arArr: Estate/Arched midY=0.305, Standard midY=0, Reverse midY=-0.305

hinge_positions._note: hng0 and hng2 hidden for single leaf (lfI==1)

po23_center_stile._note: CRITICAL — po23 center gap behavior. Ultra does NOT vertex-shift po23 geometry. The po23.json model geometry for double leaf (lfI=2) already contains TWO stiles positioned with a gap baked in. The gap is NOT created by code — it is in the model file itself.
po23_center_stile.double_leaf: pob23.visible = true — the gap is IN the model geometry
po23_center_stile.single_leaf: pob23.visible = false — po12 is used instead
po23_center_stile.clipping: pob23Mt uses pob23Cp — clipped at top based on arch height
po23_center_stile.CENTER_GAP_vertex_manipulation: WRONG — do not vertex-shift po23. The existing CENTER_GAP code in GateRenderer.js is incorrect and should be removed.

finial_y_offsets_by_arch._note: mY(grfin, htY + offset + fsv - f250v). f250v=0.205 for Vanguard (gN==2), else 0.

finial_position_arrays._note: Variable names in ultra_dsg_min.js. b=spear family (Charleston/Savannah), f250=Vanguard, st=Savannah staggered. Leaf count and arch in variable name.

scroll_accent_positions._note: Y position set dynamically in movY: (r1y/2)+(r4y/2)-rAdj or (r1y/2)+(r3y/2)-rAdj

known_bugs_to_fix.title: Charleston/Charleston Pro center gap missing
known_bugs_to_fix.root_cause: GateRenderer.js applies CENTER_GAP vertex manipulation to po23 geometry. This is WRONG. The po23.json model already has the double-leaf gap baked in. The vertex shift code must be removed.
known_bugs_to_fix.fix: Remove the CENTER_GAP vertex manipulation block in buildGate(). Load po23 geometry as-is. Ensure isDoubleLeaf check only controls pob23.visible, not geometry mutation.
known_bugs_to_fix.verify: Charleston double leaf estate arch should show visible gap at center seam matching Ultra live tool

known_bugs_to_fix.title: Pro spacing (grptx) appears between top two rails
known_bugs_to_fix.root_cause: grptx Y position is incorrect for UAS-101 (Charleston Pro). Ultra places grptx at tY+_12+fsv for gN==8 without accents. Check current GateRenderer spatialConstants vs SPATIAL_TRUTH picket_y_positions.
known_bugs_to_fix.fix: In GateRenderer.js picket section for ptRes (grptx equivalent), apply Y transform matching Ultra: for UAS-101 no-accent case use tY+_12+fsv. Only deviate for accent variants.
known_bugs_to_fix.verify: Charleston Pro should show tight spacing ONLY below the second horizontal rail, not between the two top rails

known_bugs_to_fix.title: Horizon inner post caps slightly off center
known_bugs_to_fix.root_cause: Center seam post caps (pc4/pc5) should be at x=+/-0.044 with NO CENTER_GAP offset applied. If CENTER_GAP is being added to their X positions that is wrong.
known_bugs_to_fix.fix: In GateRenderer.js M_CAPS handling, confirm idx>=4 caps use fixed x=+/-0.044 from Ultra source (pcPo[4].xD=-0.044, pcPo[5].xD=0.044). Do NOT apply CENTER_GAP to these positions.
known_bugs_to_fix.verify: Horizon double leaf: center seam caps should be centered directly above the gate seam
